description: Allow IPC (event emit) from external pages loaded in browse windows. Required on ALL desktop platforms: the injected window.__viboplr.send() bridge emits a Tauri event from the remote page, and without a remote URL scope that emit is denied (macOS/Linux included — they do NOT implicitly allow it, contrary to an earlier assumption). Each URL pattern in remote.urls adds ~210ms to tauri::generate_context!() at runtime, so we scope to https:// only (every openBrowseWindow URL in the app is https).
